Records.description: Two-loop 4-point integral with massless internal propagators, obtained by splitting both the top and bottom arcs of the sunrise graph with one external leg each; the two horizontal external legs are massive, the inserted top and bottom legs are massless. Computed numerically to 6-digit precision via the FBI representation with DCT; 726 sample points, 0.34 ms/point. Cross-checked against AMFlow. Called graph $e_4$ in Table I of the paper.
Records.location: Table I (graph e4), Two-loop examples section
